description: Solid cylinder shaft coupler with a central stepped bore, an outer flat keyway, and chamfered outer edges.
components: Central stepped bore (two coaxial cylindrical cuts)
Flat keyway cut along the outer length
Chamfers on the outer circular edges
notes: The model should be built by starting with a 50mm diameter cylinder of length 70mm aligned along the Z-axis. Create the stepped hole by subtracting two concentric cylinders (15mm diameter for Z from 0 to 30, and 20mm diameter for Z from 30 to 70). The flat keyway can be modeled as a subtractive box of width 10mm, depth 2mm, and length 70mm, cutting into the outer surface. Apply a 1mm 45-degree chamfer to both outer circular rims of the cylinder.
